/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ascii_renderer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ascii_renderer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_renderer.dir/src/math/vec2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_renderer.dir/src/math/vec3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_renderer.dir/src/math/mat2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_renderer.dir/src/math/mat3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_renderer.dir/src/framebuffer/framebuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascii_renderer.dir/src/renderer/renderer.cpp.o -o /home/ollie/Code/projects/cpp/Games/ASCII/bin/ascii_renderer
